summary: Lead accepts M7 task rail/collapsed drawer implementation after independent QA R3 ACCEPT. The implementation makes six compact task categories first-screen actionable at 1280x720 and 1440x900, keeps one drawer expanded, removes player-facing implementation jargon from the appointment-error drawer path, and adds regressions that exercise the expanded drawer.

tests_run.command: pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts -g M7 task rail

tests_run.result: format, lint, typecheck, and architecture boundaries passed.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Six compact rail cards for obligations, appointments, succession, campaign prep, notifications, and results.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: Task rail card DOM and Playwright viewport checks cover all six categories.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Only the relevant drawer expands and first screen is not swamped.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: Default active drawer is obligations; cards/drawer/primary action intersect viewport at 1280x720 and 1440x900.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Each card states problem, reason, action, severity/urgency with text/icon/color.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: ClientTaskRailCard model and CSS severity/icon treatment preserved through R3.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Responsive coverage and no hidden primary actions at 1280x720/1440x900.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: Focused Playwright and QA probe confirm visibility and no horizontal overflow.

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Player-visible copy through i18n without raw/read-model jargon.
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: R3 replaces appointment drawer jargon and scans expanded task rail in en-US and zh-CN.

risks.summary: Writer R3 handoff commit field names the pre-R3 process commit, but QA reviewed the actual R3 implementation commit and branch diff.
This task does not approve M7 content lock; UX recovery validation and later content-lock reconsideration remain separate.

next_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, then mark the task CLOSED only after origin/main contains the accepted implementation.
requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, then mark M7-TASK-RAIL-COLLAPSED-DRAWERS-001 CLOSED only after origin/main contains the accepted implementation.

decisions.decision: Accept the implementation after independent QA R3 ACCEPT and lead verification.
This task does not approve formal M7 content lock; M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains blocked.
